text: That's the best one of us in maybe three years. Where was that, the Charles?
That's Stamford, what, '93? Scott's maybe eight. You still had hair then.
Is that Dad's old Mets jacket? Didn't think that survived the move from Stamford.
Gran that's dad at maybe 12? The wallpaper's a dead giveaway. Sending this to Scott immediately.
That photo from Stamford you sent — you look exactly like dad circa 1988. Uncanny.
Statistically worst photo I've seen this year, and that includes my dad's Christmas card.
